summary: Frontend developer with 6+ years building interactive, production-ready applications. I design and implement scalable component systems with a focus on usability, consistency, and long-term maintainability, embedding WCAG and Section 508 standards directly into the architecture. I work across design and engineering to turn complex workflows into clear, intuitive interfaces and reduce friction from concept to implementation.

positions.title: Lead Engineer
bullets: Led design system governance and Storybook-driven shared UI patterns that improved interface consistency, reduced redundant work, and elevated accessibility in a multi-team platform.
Partnered with MLOps to deploy a locally-hosted LLM environment under compliance constraints and led the chatbot interface redesign for a more trustworthy, usable experience.
Drove design process outcomes with stakeholder alignment and interactive prototypes to enable cleaner handoff and reduce implementation rework.
Delivered an accessible stepper-driven data portal replacing a manual Excel/email workflow, reducing support tickets and showing measurable user and business value.

positions.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Executed an Angular-to-React frontend migration as a design-quality initiative, improving structure, component reuse, and long-term maintainability while preserving established user workflows.
Collaborated with product and design partners to evolve interaction behavior through iterative prototypes, which guided implementation decisions and UI scope clarity.
Maintained clean handoff artifacts with Storybook examples, component doc comments, and accessibility annotations to align designer intent and engineering delivery.

experience.title: Founder
bullets: Led design-first product delivery for small businesses and nonprofits, owning UX strategy, prototyping, accessible UI patterns, and frontend implementation with handoff-ready documentation.
Designed and launched a multi-state restaurant employee portal and scheduling platform still in active use, with clear interaction patterns, accessibility checks, and maintenance guidance.
Built responsive, accessible components with modern frameworks while producing style guides and usage notes for cross-functional teams to preserve quality in support and iteration.

experience.title: UI Developer
bullets: Produced wireframes and interaction flows to clarify requirements, enabling early team consensus and reducing ambiguity before implementation.
Translated design intent into reusable component patterns, shipping early Storybook examples in TypeScript that anchored visual and behavior consistency.
Focused on design-to-dev alignment by documenting layout decisions, accessibility considerations, and expected interactions as engineering reference.

experience.title: Web Developer
bullets: Designed geospatial workflow interfaces with clear hierarchy and predictable interactions for analyst users, using Vue and Vuetify components.
Translated motion concepts into performant GSAP and interaction-based UI, balancing visual affordance with accessibility and load constraints.
Turned visual and interaction ideas into reusable accessible Vue components, with documented patterns for future iteration and handoff.

awards.title: Platinum Award (Booz Allen Hamilton)
awards.details: Built and shipped a custom registration and scheduling platform for a large multi-day convention (100+ attendees), centralizing session sign-ups and on-site check-in and supporting real-time scheduling during the event.

awards.title: Gold Award (Booz Allen Hamilton)
awards.details: Led an iterative design and prototyping process incorporating stakeholder feedback at each stage; the final direction was chosen over a competing proposal, accelerating stakeholder buy-in and streamlining implementation.

awards.title: Gold Award (Booz Allen Hamilton)
awards.details: Directed the redesign and rebuild of a high-visibility enterprise application used across multiple client teams; improvements to usability and visual clarity increased adoption and earned recognition from Amazon Developers for design excellence.

projects.title: No Whiteboard Jobs Dashboard - Personal Project
projects.description: Designed a data-first dashboard experience on the Hiring Without Whiteboards dataset with search, filtering, pagination, and responsive card/list views that support user task flows. Built with Astro, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, using AI-assisted workflows to accelerate development while maintaining code quality and consistency.

projects.title: By Astrid Beauty Salon - Freelance
projects.description: Designed and developed the salon’s first website in 2020, then led a full refactor in 2026 to improve performance, accessibility, and maintainability. Built responsive, accessible UI with clear service pathways, while evolving the structure and codebase to better support future updates and long-term use.

projects.title: vvd - Freelance
projects.description: Supported development of a campaign feature and contributed to a legacy refactor onto a new codebase. Designed and guided an AI-assisted development workflow where bug reports triggered automated ticket and branch creation, agent-driven implementation, and PR generation. Led PRD creation and directed multiple agents through execution, reviewing outputs and ensuring code quality, alignment, and successful integration into the codebase.

Combined: HTML/CSS • JavaScript • TypeScript • React • Next.js • Vue • Angular • Astro • Framer Motion • GSAP • Canvas API • Figma • Storybook • TanStack Query • Supabase • Vercel • Git • Python • CI/CD • Testing • WCAG & Section 508 • GitHub Copilot • Multi-agent orchestration • LLM workflow design
